relations.subject: Scale-throated earthcreeper
relations.evidence: The scale-throated earthcreeper (Upucerthia dumetaria) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Peru, and possibly Uruguay.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Scale-throated earthcreeper
relations.evidence: The species inhabits puna grassland and arid scrublands in both the lowlands and Andes
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
